notes: Landing page factual claims grounded in the client's live site. Carrot / HSA / FSA are framed only as accepted payment paths whose eligibility varies by plan — never as guaranteed coverage, reimbursement, or savings. No reviews were supplied as attributable testimonials, so the Testimonials section uses voice-of-customer themes plus a 'references on request' statement (no fabricated names or star ratings).

facts.claim: 14+ years of experience in home & childcare.
Services offered: postpartum & recovery support, overnight newborn care, birth doula support, lactation education, and gentle sleep support.
Birth doula support is offered for labor and delivery.
Postpartum doula support is offered for recovery and the early weeks at home.
Team-based model provides reliable backup doula coverage.
Carrot Fertility, HSA, and FSA are accepted payment paths toward doula services; eligibility varies by plan.
Founder Carla Rocha is a Certified Birth & Postpartum Doula, Newborn Care Specialist, Pediatric Sleep Consultant, Lactation Educator, and Childbirth Educator.
